hypothesis: If MatAgent's integrated AI agent—comprising LLM-driven planning with memory tools, proposition, diffusion-based crystal-structure generation, and iComFormer-based property evaluation—guides iterative composition and structure discovery toward specified formation-energy targets, then it will achieve a higher success rate (within ±0.25 eV/atom of the target) and greater compositional validity, uniqueness, and novelty than tool-free LLM baselines and the MatterGen diffusion model.
